scripts.build:runtime: npm --workspace @multimodal-ui/core run build && npm --workspace @multimodal-ui/react run build
scripts.build:all: npm run build && npm run build:registry
scripts.build: npm run build:runtime && npm --workspace apps/docs run build
scripts.typecheck: npm --workspace @multimodal-ui/core run build && npm run typecheck --workspaces --if-present
scripts.verify: npm run typecheck && npm test && npm run build
scripts.verify:registry: npm --workspace @multimodal-ui/shadcn run test && npm run registry:build
scripts.verify:package-consumer: npm run build:runtime && npm --workspace apps/docs run typecheck:package-consumer && npm --workspace apps/docs run test:package-consumer && npm --workspace apps/docs run build:package-consumer
